strings.EQUIPMENT_GUILLOTINE_PICKUP: Damage a targeted enemy and disable their elite effects temporarily.
strings.EQUIPMENT_GUILLOTINE_DESC: Deal <style=cIsDamage>1000%</style> damage to a targeted enemy and <style=cIsUtility>disable</style> any <style=cDeath>elite effects</style> it has for <style=cIsUtility>12 seconds</style>.
